note.zh: DeepSeek-V4-Pro(Qoder · Max)用仓库标准中文提示词一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行,任何 bug 均不修复。自命名「围地战神」。诊断:API 合规但实战偏弱,对 baseline-expander 两个种子均告负(138:1205、154:979,圈地约 227/145 格),扩张跟不上基线,被三到八倍拉开。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by DeepSeek-V4-Pro (Qoder, Max) from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt, no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished and no bug is ever fixed; this registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "围地战神" (War God of Enclosure). Diagnosis: API-compliant but competitively weak — loses to baseline-expander on both seeds (138:1205, 154:979; ~227/145 captures), expansion never keeps pace and it falls 3–8x behind.
